name: Smart Bharat AI
overview: Next-Gen AI-powered Citizen Platform for discovering government schemes, filing civic complaints, managing foundational IDs, and receiving 24/7 policy assistance.

tech_stack.frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, WebGL Shaders
tech_stack.backend: Node.js, Express, TypeScript, JWT Auth, REST APIs

modules.name: Dashboard & Hero Showcase
requirements: Render interactive 3D hero video on the right column of the landing page.
Display quick trust metrics, service search bar, and direct navigation links.
Ensure instant initial load with non-blocking preloading.

modules.name: Government Schemes Discovery Engine
requirements: Multi-word real-time search across scheme names, descriptions, eligibility, and benefits.
Centered backdrop-blurred category modal drawer featuring 144+ scheme categories.
Smooth scroll to search results upon query submission or category selection.
Support native Web Speech API for voice search.

modules.name: Foundational Government IDs Portal
requirements: Comprehensive guide and wizard for Aadhaar, PAN, Voter ID, Passport, Driving License, Ration Card.
Pre-fill capabilities and interactive field validation for application submission.

modules.name: Civic Complaints & Issue Auto-Routing
requirements: 5-slide auto-rotating showcase displaying exclusively real civic issue photos.
Remove outer frame platform container to maximize image canvas size.
Category selection grid for Roads, Water, Electricity, Drainage, Sanitation, Healthcare, etc.
AI auto-routing to PWD, Jal Board, and Power Corp with resolution time estimation.

modules.name: 24/7 AI Policy Assistant
requirements: Conversational AI interface for citizen queries, scheme recommendations, and policy guidance.
Voice input support and suggested query chips.

modules.name: Verified Credential Vault
requirements: Digital wallet for storing verified document numbers and tracking application status.

security_requirements: JWT token authentication on protected endpoints.
Input sanitization against XSS, SQL, and NoSQL injections.
CORS headers and security middleware enforcement.
performance_requirements: Sub-second initial page load and route transitions.
0ms blocking on main thread during background asset caching.
